you answer that it's you that have answered. I thank you for his rejoicing that he took
that time to pause, to rejoice for what you did in his life and how you led and the kindness
that you showed. God, I pray that you'd help each of us tonight to recognize as Eliezer
did that life is too difficult for us. We need you, God. We need your leadership. We
need you to lead us day by day, step by step. God, I pray that you'd help us to surrender
to Thee. Lord, help us to trust Thee and to obey Thee. I pray that in the moment of
invitation that you'd have your will and way in the hearts of your people and we'll thank
you for it. In Christ's name we pray. Would you stand with me?
